title: Opening for Software Engineer at Milkbasket

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Milkbasket
jsonLd.description:
Join the Milkbasket family as a Software Engineer in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Milkbasket:
Milkbasket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket!
